title: Navy Satin Ribbon 38mm x 9 Meters - Ideal for Crafts, Gift Wrapping, Flower Bouquet, and Weddings
features: 🎉1.5" wide double faced ribbons are made from 100% premium yarn and constructed with a density weave to provide an indeformable, easy-to-fold quality.
🎉With our selection of 14 stunning ribbon colors. Whether you need a delicate pink for a baby shower or a vibrant red for a Christmas present, we've got you covered.
🎉Continuous 10-yard Comes in a roll, so you won't have to worry about splices. And with a smooth surface and no wrinkles, you can use them straight out of the package.
🎉Unleash your creativity with our high-quality, silky and glossy satin ribbons, available in 7 different sizes to meet your crafting needs at an unbeatable value price.
🎉Satin ribbons are incredibly versatile and perfect for bows, gift wrapping, weddings, home decoration, and more, adding a touch of elegance and charm to your creation.
